descFull: A Claude skill that keeps your AI coding tools from contradicting  each other. Generates requirements.md, design.md, and tasks.md  before any code is written — then creates matching config files  for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and Aider.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: I Made a Claude Skill for Spec-Driven Development (SDD)
